AWS lets us effectively create accounts that we can use to log in to someone else's account. We will be using this to create accounts allowing us to log into Craig's aws account instead of using our own account.  
![][image1]  
If you have any questions feel free to ping me (Trevor)

1. Sign in to your aws account as the root user (no pictures, you got this\!\!\!)  
2. Search and go to IAM

![][image2]

3. Click on the policies tab  
   ![][image3]  
     
4. Click create policy

![][image4]

5. Select JSON then paste the following text  
   {  
       "Version": "2012-10-17",  
       "Statement": {  
           "Effect": "Allow",  
           "Action": "sts:AssumeRole",  
           "Resource": "arn:aws:iam::650244845886:role/Trail\_Mgr\_Dev"  
       }  
   }  
   

![][image5]

6. Scroll down and click next  
   ![][image6]  
7. Name the policy AssumeTrailDeveloper

![][image7]

8. Create the policy  
   ![][image8]  
9. Go to the IAM users tab

![][image9]

10. Click create user

![][image10]

11. Enter User name (this is what you will type to login) called TrailDev,  give them access to the console, enter a custom password, uncheck create new password (this is fine since it is you creating your password for your user, not for someone else), then click next

![][image11]

12. Click attach policies direcly

![][image12]

13. Enter “AssumeTrailDev” and click to attach it

![][image13]

14. Click create user

![][image14]

15. Click on your name in the upper right corner

![][image15]

16. Click sign out

![][image16]

17. Sign in to console

![][image17]

18. Enter correct information for the newly created user

![][image18]

19. Click on your user name in the upper right

![][image19]

20. Click switch role

![][image20]

21. Enter role information (or click this link [https://signin.aws.amazon.com/switchrole?roleName=Trail\_Mgr\_Dev\&account=650244845886](https://signin.aws.amazon.com/switchrole?roleName=Trail_Mgr_Dev&account=650244845886) to skip steps 19-21) 

![][image21]

22. Search for and open S3

![][image22]

23. You should see this bucket that exists in craigs account, all happy

![][image23]
